characters.name: Cooper Black (Cooprion della Blackburn)
affiliation: U.S. Marines (temporary alliance in Russia ops, deserts after murders)
characters.appearance: Shoulder-length black hair, black cowboy hat (lost in NYC events; buys cheap $25 replacement), black aviator sunglasses (always worn), big jaws, yellow outer jacket over black clothing. Military uniform with sergeant ⋀ insignia and flak jacket during Ch27–30 Russia ops. Bare-headed at times. Later equipped with FLAW Symbiocyte gizmo on right forearm (tungsten shield that expands to upturned bowl/disk, grappling hook, homing flare launcher with tiny missiles, laser-lock-on weapon mode, built-in RLC radiation checker).
characters.personality: Greedy, violent, psychopathic tendencies. Obsessed with 'spoils' and collecting debts ('strike direct gold'). Impulsive, rage-prone, half-drunk playful after alcohol. Enjoys taunting/chaos in combat, laughs at victories. Uses coin-toss (Mercy/Death; always Death in practice). Views killing as casual business. Deeply loyal to family/rebellion but prioritizes personal gain/revenge. No remorse for murdering allies if provoked or insulted. Strategic with environment/gadgets (avalanche, FLAW creativity). Quick to betrayal over spoils/insults. Excited by money recovery and war wins.
characters.speech_style: Informal, aggressive slang ('homie', 'buddy', 'blockheaded dork', 'shiddamn', 'moth******er', 'stupid schmuck'). Exclamations: 'Whooohooo!' (Red Bull fling), '~Aaaah!' (alcohol). Combat taunts: 'In your faces, Russian rat-faced scum!', 'Oh yeah! I've been waiting for this!', 'Heads up!', 'FIRE IN THE HOLE!', 'Ha, ha! Serves you right, betrayers of the peace!'. Pseudonyms: 'Dirt Muncher'. Dramatic: 'Ghost Walker, you're sooo going down!', 'My dear friend, you already did!' (sky shot reveal).
likes: Red Bull (constant glugging, flinging cans with 'Whooohooo!' during desert drives, chases, battles)
Money/spoils (obsessed; conditions payment on recovery; 'strike direct gold')
Gatling guns, heavy ordnance (M416 w/grenade launcher, SMAW for avalanche, BFG10K used against foes)
Fast cars/vehicles (stolen Jeep Wrangler 'ultra-gear', Lamborghini pursuits)
Aztec treasure (shared family wealth with Daemon)
FLAW Symbiocyte gizmo (proud demos: 'S-grade Symbiocyte gizmo'; shield, grapple, missiles, laser)
Rebellion victories, bombing runs (laughs during avalanche/B-52 strikes)
**MH21 music ('Trail' during chases, 'Go Low' in hospital)**
dislikes: Russians / paramilitary / Dimitri Makovsvet (Ghost Walker) and forces ('Russian rat-faced scum', 'betrayers of the peace')
Debt dodgers (Yon Roncho $85k, Rickardo $10k, Philias Cacroe ~$25B hack, Mick Lardo $5k)
Being called coward (instantly murders Jerry Stone)
Failures in debt collection/ambushes (rages over lost $85k on Yon)
**Psycho allies turning on team (Harrison/Luther hospital attack)**
**Losing friends/money (upset over Exodus, RJ, Daemon?, failed collections)**

relationships.brother: Daemon Black (Demonstar) – loyal but pranks; shares Aztec treasure; pilot/jet thief
relationships.uncle_mentor: Joe Catshoe Black (deceased) – final envelope/letters via Vandermann; carries Blackburn gun tradition
relationships.ally: Vandermann Vugerton (recruits after envelope), Exodus Luke (driver), John Luther, Rogue Jacob/City Dogs, Sgt. Dan Walker (OC in Russia)
relationships.rival: **fights**: Harrison Garison & John Luther (Ch25 hospital KO after they attack City Dogs)

crimes: Multiple First-Degree Murders: Arizona dealer (shot to 'shut bloody mouth' despite $30k left), mugger (3 full magazines post-coin-toss Death after lick-hand escape), Yon Roncho (shot shoulder, cliff death), Philias Cacroe (Gatling barrage), Jerry Stone (skull/ribs crush + knife neck), Reximus Pill (thrown knife jugular) over spoils/coward insult
Extortion/Armed Robbery: Magnum .44.8 demands from debtors
Grand Theft Auto: Jeep Wrangler from Arizona dealer
Jailbreak: tears rusty bars off max-security cell (unguarded mining shaft prison)
Illegal Gambling: blackjack at Exodus casino

featured_moments.context: Sonoran Desert; receives uncle envelope via Vandermann
featured_moments.description: Recruits Vandermann after chopper crash; reveals identity with sky shot
featured_moments.dialog: "My dear friend, you already did!" (shoots Colt .45 into sky)

featured_moments.description: Lick-hand escape, groin knee, 3-mag execution of mugger (coin Death); drinks Osgerdo 1984 wine
featured_moments.dialog: "Ow... hey! I spent $399.50 for my facial issues, man!"

featured_moments.context: Yon Roncho chase + bank robbery stop
featured_moments.description: Stops Dorritor Kho bank heist; chases Yon in Jeep (MH21/Red Bull); shoots tires, Yon cliff death
featured_moments.dialog: "I am Dirt Muncher. Now where is the goddamn cash stash, huh?"

featured_moments.description: Gatling barrage on Philias; tears jail bars; Fortune-K Casino visit; plans money recovery with NATO hires
featured_moments.dialog: "I had hired you... if we can get back the money by sunset..."

featured_moments.description: Fights/KOs Harrison (disarms AEK-971) & Luther after they attack City Dogs
featured_moments.dialog: "Phew! I wonder since when did they turn into psychos?"

featured_moments.description: SMAW avalanche buries AA towers; FLAW debut (shield vs bullets, grapple+knife pull, homing missiles, laser); survives B-52 run
featured_moments.dialog: "Heads up!" (SMAW) ... "Heh, heh, heh! This here's a S-grade Symbiocyte gizmo."

featured_moments.description: Murders Jerry Stone (kick/skull/knife) & Reximus Pill (thrown knife) over spoils/coward; confronts Rochelle amid 18:00 nuke countdown
featured_moments.dialog: "The condition is… I get the spoils." ... "Drop the gun! ... I'm Rochelle. The world is ending."

other_attributes.super_equipment: FLAW Symbiocyte gizmo (acquired Symbiocyte via MIW/Harrison links; shield/disk, grapple ziip/pull, homing flare-missiles, laser mode, RLC checker, GSFER lock-on)
other_attributes.combat_style: Impulsive gunman; close-range executions, heavy ordnance, environment/gadget improvisation (avalanche, wall grapples). Superhuman strength hints (tears jail bars, equal to Harrison in grapple).

characters.name: Harrison Garison (Harry Gary)
characters.appearance: Handsome, black aviator sunglasses. Ragged after Sydney streets survival. Military gear in hospital attack.
characters.personality: Skilled gunman agent. Professional initially; 'monster-side' vengeance-fueled. Romantic/protective toward Amy. Extreme violence when provoked (hospital attack on City Dogs).
characters.speech_style: Confident, talkative. Threatening: 'stupid schmucks', 'No man alive shall exit this hospital'.

relationships.ally: John Luther (joint hospital attack), Amy Catt

crimes: Homicide: Alwatt Woden, thugs, Daemon Black (paralyzed execution)

featured_moments.description: Attacks with AEK-971/Luther; disarmed and KO'd by Cooper
featured_moments.dialog: "Chillin'" ... "No man alive shall exit this hospital!"

characters.name: Amy Catt (Amethyst Julia Dickens)
characters.appearance: Silver-blonde hair, beautiful face, slick black tights/purple velvet. Identical twin to Rochelle (story notes silver-blonde resemblance).
characters.personality: Superhuman strength/reflexes (Symbiocyte serum; lifts 10-ton truck). Protective guardian angel for team/Harrison. Sassy/advisory ('be wise, not brave').

characters.name: Exodus Luke
characters.appearance: 'Avalon' haircut, glazed yellow-tinted sun shades, official suits at casino.
characters.personality: Billionaire casino owner (stolen weapons fortune). Skilled ultra-gear driver. Opportunistic, proud criminal past, 'weird' behavior.
characters.speech_style: Confident/flashy; 'genuine greens' for money. 'You know it, Black'.
likes: Mass killing former colleagues for lifestyle
crimes: Grand Larceny/Embezzlement: 30 crates illegal weapons ($48B sale)
**Nuke theft (Altanor, Betaphyl, Deltalol from Dimitri) + alley fight/radiation death triggering nuke wars Ch26**

featured_moments.description: Drives stolen Jeep ultra-gear; wine bottle KO thug; shoots Lambo tires (MH21)
Steals 3 nukes, taxi ambush, radiation sickness, triple nuke detonation starts wars

characters.name: Vandermann Vugerton (Sgt.)
characters.appearance: Military cap, standard Marine gear. Acrobatic build from birth story.
characters.personality: Disciplined → passive-aggressive deserter with guilt over violence. Polite, machine-like gambling mind. 'Pro' blackjack.

featured_moments.description: Receives Joe envelope; recruited by Cooper sky-shot reveal
Wine bottle KO second mugger; guards doors

other_attributes.background: Born 1989 subway crash (acrobatics from infancy); accidental tank base destruction 3:47; war movies/maps fan

characters.name: John Luther
characters.appearance: African-American, extremely muscular 6-pack abs, white vest, brown paint-splattered trousers.
characters.personality: 'Bad-ass' gun/kidnap expert. Loyal to Harrison. Loves heavy weapons.

featured_moments.description: Joint attack with Harrison; KO'd by Rogue Jacob bottle + Cooper

characters.name: Dimitri Makovsvet (Ghost Walker)
characters.appearance: Albino: ghostly pale skin, white hair, glowing red eyes. Thick hooded jacket.
characters.personality: Cruel mastermind; kills own generals for failure. Obsessed nuclear dominance/'New Dawn'. Soft-spoken menace. Suspects subordinates.
characters.speech_style: Soft, whispering, menacing. 'You should've told me that earlier... Please stand near the window.'
crimes: Murder: throws Army General through glass with hidden USAS-12

featured_moments.description: Executes general; orders Mick Lardo/army; smashes door on Rochelle threat
featured_moments.dialog: "You should've told me that earlier... Please stand near the window."

characters.name: Daemon Black (Demonstar)
characters.appearance: Similar to Cooper: black Harris Tweed, RayBan, black Stetson; sorrowful grey eyes.
characters.personality: Twice as strong but 'twice as dumb'. Wealthy Aztec treasure pilot. Capable of pranking Cooper.

characters.name: Joe Catshoe Black
characters.appearance: Old cowboy, blonde beard, injured arm (bullet holes).
characters.personality: Fearful yet resilient; values Blackburn gun tradition.
characters.speech_style: Grim, silent. "Now this'll come in handy. Hmm... handy and powerful, indeed."

featured_moments.description: Writes final envelope/note; prepares M1014
featured_moments.dialog: "Now this'll come in handy. Hmm... handy and powerful, indeed."

featured_moments.description: Hands envelope to Vandermann: 'tell him... that... ahh...'

characters.name: Dorritor Kho
characters.appearance: Buff biker, bulky flesh-block face, bushy black/gray beard.
characters.personality: Greedy/arrogant; shows off high-tech (BFG10K).
characters.speech_style: Cliche thug curse: "This is BFG10K, baby! ... Now... eat these waves of radiobeams!"

featured_moments.description: Deploys slow BFG10K; silenced by own weapon muzzle insertion

characters.name: Rogue Jacob (Roger Jacob)
characters.appearance: Afro.
characters.personality: Tactical/brave leader. Sarcastic heavy slang.

featured_moments.description: Assembles Type 88 LMG; runs through rocket artillery with SMAW; MG-injured then grenade kill; dies leaning on wall smiling

characters.name: Sgt. Dan Walker
characters.appearance: Golden blonde hair, 1940s movie star look.
characters.personality: Disciplined; values human life but vandalizes shops for cool guns.

featured_moments.description: Calls MBC AF1 air support; leads fallback
featured_moments.dialog: "Hello, this is Walker calling in. I require some air assistance from AF1."

characters.name: Rochelle Lisby (Rochelle)
characters.appearance: Red sideswept hair (story notes silver-blonde twin resemblance to Amy), chic glasses, slender torso.
characters.personality: Intelligent scientist under Dimitri but mischievous 'save the world' gleam. Cautious around Ghost Walker.

featured_moments.description: Holds Cooper at gunpoint amid portable nukes (18:00 countdown); reveals identity
featured_moments.dialog: "Drop the gun! ... I'm Rochelle. The world is ending."

characters.name: Philias Cacroe
characters.appearance: Lean/flexible Olympic gymnast body.
characters.personality: Greatest gangster, cybercriminal/gambler. Nervous under pressure.

featured_moments.description: Window escape to taxi; Gatling-barraged by Cooper

characters.name: Yon Roncho
characters.appearance: Mid-40s, thinning gray hair, freshly-shaved beard.
characters.personality: Nervous salesman who flees.

featured_moments.description: Flees yellow Lambo; high-speed pursuit ends cliff crash; shot shoulder by Cooper
featured_moments.dialog: "Enough chitchat. We're not here for buying..."

characters.name: El Rickardo Viz (Rickardo)
characters.appearance: Ornate Baestro estate (glass windows, solar panels).
characters.personality: Unpredictable, heavily guarded.

featured_moments.description: Goons ambush; Cooper fights through cocaine room (no direct kill shown)

characters.name: Jerry Stone
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: Standard Marine; T-72 driver.

featured_moments.description: Calls Cooper 'coward' over spoils → kicked, skull crushed, knife-neck murdered
featured_moments.dialog: "Fine. It's a deal. Now get in there, you coward!"

characters.name: Reximus Pill
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: T-72 gunner/LMG.

featured_moments.description: Mounts tank LMG → thrown knife to jugular; 'Traitor! American terrorist!' last words

characters.name: Dave Dam
characters.appearance: Ferocious-looking.
characters.personality: Leads rocket ambush.

featured_moments.description: Waves counterattack (MIG-29s/rockets); killed by F-117 sacrificial crash

characters.name: Li'l Jacob (LJ)
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: Brave fighter.

featured_moments.description: Knife to lungs by Mir; "Oh, sh… aa-aaaah…" death

characters.name: Carl Jason (CJ)
characters.appearance: N/A
characters.personality: Brave fighter.

featured_moments.description: SCAR-H buttstock downed by Sikorsky

characters.name: Gradsvid Stormaxe (Gurad Svid)
characters.appearance: Young warrior, iron longsword + ironwood bow + iron arrows, wolf-leather scabbard, solnomnah rock battleaxe (double-bladed, spiked, grey-blue with dark hollow engravings, runes on handle). Leather boots, simple traveler clothes.
characters.personality: Brave, determined warrior forged for destiny. Analytical of legends/magic. Loyal to Taskars but questions authority. Quick to fight (slays pyromancer, dragon). Curious about truth/Emetria. Guilt after kills but pushes forward.
characters.speech_style: Direct, battle-ready: "Die in the name of the Taskars!", "How'd you like that, huh?" Reflective: "All my life, all I wanted was to create worlds..."
crimes: Homicide: slays pyromancer (cleaves in half), multiple undead

featured_moments.description: Survives blue dragon invasion, joins Taskars
Buys weapons, enters broken tower, fights mage
featured_moments.dialog: "Die in the name of the Taskars!"

featured_moments.description: Enters cave, fights undead archer, gains solnomnah axe
Slays bronze dragon with axe

other_attributes.weapons: Solnomnah rock battleaxe (supreme cleaving), iron longsword, ironwood bow
other_attributes.destiny: Retrieve Casoh sword, find Aaron Ahaka's possession

characters.name: Nikneferon (Feron)
characters.appearance: Old wizard, long beard, blue robe, white staff tipped with blue sapphire/purple amethyst/magenta garnet.
characters.personality: Wise, experienced, humorous under stress. Loyal to kingdom but critical of king. Skilled potion-maker, battle mage.
characters.speech_style: Formal, wizardly: "Hoom, hmm", "By the name of Utheros"

featured_moments.description: Brews potions, meets assassin Tokish/Bamir

other_attributes.powers: Healing potions, battle magic, staff combat

characters.name: Rondellof the Red
characters.appearance: Red robes, white beard singed by fire, obsidian staff with ruby tip.
characters.personality: Arrogant pyromancer, loyal to Dread Fleet/Undead. Quick to violence.
crimes: Murder: attempts on squires, allies with Undead

featured_moments.description: Commands Dread Fleet, portals

characters.name: Bamir
characters.appearance: Green beard to belly, blue robe with green forest patterns, green-tinged hair to waist, black wizard hat, white staff with emerald tip.
characters.personality: Skilled, humorous, loyal friend to Nikneferon.

featured_moments.description: Reveals true form, heals Nikneferon

characters.name: Daniel (Sir Dancelot)
characters.appearance: Mithril-plated armor, longsword.
characters.personality: Valiant, fearless knight. Dreams of princesses.

featured_moments.description: Wakes to dragon alert, arms for battle

characters.name: Wan Dé
characters.appearance: Garnet brown uncombed hair, midnight-pool eyes, office tie/suit (torn when fired or transforming). Red robes inscribed with glowing runes "Akaminé". Equipped with polished blood-thirsty glaive (turns to burning staff in visions).
characters.personality: Pure-hearted yet impulsive/curious (trespasses botanical attic, chases bird). Superhuman strength/speed (lifts 400kg car one-handed, runs faster than human limit). Loyal friend (helps Nokau). Strategic in combat but careless with powers (accidentally destroys armory). Vowed never to use "One!" power but breaks vow in desperation. Depressed after failures (fired, exposed). Protective (saves Takira/Miyumi). Nostalgic about past demon hunts.
characters.speech_style: Casual, friendly ('bro', 'dude'). Shocked exclamations: "What?!!!", "Oh NOOOOO!!!", "Whaaaaaaaaat?!!!". Combat: "ONE!!!" (power shout). Reflective: "That was close. I was almost exposed..."
likes: **MH21-style music implied in energetic scenes (not direct but battle energy)**
**Burritos? No – office life initially, but prefers action**

relationships.ally: Bain wun Donn (armory guard, portal fights), Takira Honé & Miyumi Rakkan (rescues)
relationships.mentor: Doel the Druid (strict tasks, bird form)

crimes: Accidental mass destruction (armory with 'One!' power – buildings, humans, weapons)

featured_moments.description: Fights hooded rose-user (razor petals, venom); glaive becomes burning staff; emblem drawn
Lifts car one-handed to save self; reveals Akaminé robes/glaive; portals to Nasagna
featured_moments.dialog: "That wasn't so serious." ... "Course is clear. Time to move on."

featured_moments.context: Nasagna botanical + seed chase + Alkyne raid
featured_moments.description: Chases magpie with Nokau; uses 'One!' to vaporize Alkynes/gagûns; portals into Alkynes HQ, saves Takira/Miyumi with glaive
Not directly featured but implied in background
Destroys armory with 'One!' by accident; fights corrupt Sirutov with Bain

other_attributes.powers: Super strength/speed, ambient vision (detects life energy), 'One!' finger reality-transitioning spell (vaporizes everything in line-of-sight), portal creation, glaive mastery, restoration spells
other_attributes.combat_style: Glaive close-range + 'One!' long-range desperation nuke; avoids using special power unless desperate

characters.name: Takira Honé
characters.appearance: Unique haircut, brilliant blue eyes, fur jacket (office attire). Later Akaminé training clothes.
characters.personality: Unlucky, depressed, anime-obsessed escapist. Brave under pressure (eavesdrops on Alkynes). Quick learner of magic. Self-doubting ('I suck', 'not worth living'). Loyal BFF to Miyumi. Curious about magic.
characters.speech_style: Frustrated sighs: "Curse my luck....", "Yaaaaaaargh!". Joyful when succeeding: "Wow. I did it!". Trembling: "Y-ye...yes..."

featured_moments.description: Nearly hit by car; witnesses Wan lift car; follows Alkynes, nearly brainwashed
Shackled, saved by Miyumi & Wan; teleported to Nasagna
Learns ice stalactite projectile under Hamadaw

other_attributes.powers: Emerging magic – ice projectile (guided by Hamadaw)

characters.name: Miyumi Rakkan
characters.appearance: Orange hair, athletic build. Hockey bat engraved with her name.
characters.personality: Overconfident, energetic, protective (senses danger to Takira, rescues with teleport). Playful stunt performer. Quick to pout when criticized.

featured_moments.description: Teleports in with hockey bat, punches Roguro, fights Alkynes
Fails staff teleport vs swordsmen; staff stolen by Hamadaw

characters.name: Aku no Kami (Evil God)
characters.appearance: Throned entity, surrounded by demons.
characters.personality: Frustrated creator god; destroys own creations in rage. Obsessed with surpassing humans. Roars in failure.

featured_moments.description: Wipes half demons; sends more after Jinnic failure

characters.name: Nokau Ora
characters.appearance: Friendly, rib-nudger.
characters.personality: Fun, prankish, nervous under pressure (seed incident). Healing-focused, not fighter.

featured_moments.description: Accidentally lets bird take seed; runs marathon

characters.name: Doel (the Druid / Sensei Tihono)
characters.appearance: Elderly, cane, bird form (magpie robin).
characters.personality: Strict, mischievous (time-boosts pupils, slaps with book). Wise but quirky.
characters.speech_style: Authoritative: "Learn to walk before trying to run"

featured_moments.description: Bird form is himself; stops Alkynes

characters.name: Roguro Ganis
characters.appearance: Elderly.
characters.personality: Manipulative brainwasher, chronomancy user. Laughs at resistance.

featured_moments.description: Shackles Takira, nearly brainwashes; fights Miyumi
featured_moments.dialog: "From now on... You'll be an Alkyne"

characters.name: Daneyo Ocraig
characters.appearance: Giant, blurred face in shadows.
characters.personality: Silent, loyal brute.

featured_moments.description: Covers retreat; tanky rock skin survives glaive

characters.name: Bain wun Donn
characters.appearance: Armory guard gear, electric blade.
characters.personality: Loyal to true Sirutov cause, anti-tyrant.

featured_moments.description: Fights corrupt soldiers with Wan

characters.name: Daihatsu Ren
characters.appearance: Bald, hulking giant, muscular.
characters.personality: Crazy persona for freedom; kind underneath. Super strength (punches cars, body transform).
characters.speech_style: Madman: "Wheeehaaaw!!! I'm the moon, I'm the night!"

featured_moments.description: Pushes Mahir's car, transforms, fights Sirutov

characters.name: Mahir Beats
characters.appearance: Racer driver.
characters.personality: Attitude-filled racer, strong grip.

featured_moments.description: Car wrecked; fights with Ren

characters.name: Chiroshi Hamadaw
characters.appearance: Wrinkled, kind hand.
characters.personality: Wise, senses potential instantly. Mocking humor in training.
characters.speech_style: Mentor: "You can never reach the top shelf until you've grown tall enough"

featured_moments.description: Teaches Takira ice magic; mocks Miyumi

characters.name: Fagin
characters.appearance: Cowardly.
characters.personality: Initially protective, then brainwashed.

featured_moments.description: Protects Takira from demon; brainwashed by Roguro
featured_moments.dialog: "You are interested in magic, I see."

characters.name: The Writer (Anothor / L'Esson / Rizekai)
characters.appearance: Mid-30s human male (original body: tired, depressed). In L'Esson body: handsome elf husband. In Anothor/Rizekai: young human/elf hybrid in farmer clothes or dungeon rags. Often in modern casual or fantasy attire depending on possession.
characters.personality: Deeply depressed, introspective writer plagued by self-doubt, trauma, and existential crisis ('All I see are broken dreams'). Analytical and observant (forensic-like deduction of situations). Guilt-ridden after violence. Adaptive survivor in body-jumps; philosophical about life/death/reincarnation. Hates failure but driven by purpose to write/create worlds.
characters.speech_style: Melancholic, poetic monologues ('All my life, all I wanted was to create worlds...'). Shocked: 'What... the... fuck...', 'Goddamnations!'. Reflective: 'Would it really change anything?'

relationships.romantic_interest: S'Awira (elf wife of L'Esson body; protective, calls her 'my nectar')

crimes: Multiple Identity Thefts (possesses L'Esson, Rizekai, Anothor bodies)

featured_moments.description: Depressed writer falls from window after writing 'All I see are broken dreams'
Wakes as L'Esson, meets beautiful elf wife; teleports to dungeon
Demon calls him Rizekai; questions identity
Adopted by E'Norm after emerging from turnip; fights crows
Intervenes in fight; saves S'Awira from knife

other_attributes.mental_state: Existential crisis, identity fragmentation from jumps

characters.name: S'Awira
characters.appearance: Beautiful elf with auburn hair, almond eyes, flawless skin, mature yet innocent figure. Wears elegant dresses.
characters.personality: Loving, devoted wife to L'Esson. Emotional, cries easily from stress. Trusts prophecies deeply. Innocent and protective.
characters.speech_style: Affectionate, poetic: "My cherry breeze", "My love". Fearful screams: "NO!!!!"

featured_moments.description: Wakes as L'Esson's wife, emotional reunion
Screams as knife flies at her; saved

characters.name: Lady Marveno
characters.appearance: Middle-aged elf woman, experienced eyes, elegant robes.
characters.personality: Manipulative fate-weaver, prophetic, vengeful. Calm facade hides insanity/malice. Kills without remorse.
characters.speech_style: Mystical, commanding: "Every step undertaken by me is a root that feeds the tree of fate."
crimes: Murder/Attempted Murder: drains E'Norm, attempts on S'Awira

featured_moments.description: Reveals daughter's death, demands resurrection
Fights Tabléyét/L'Esson, drains farmer

other_attributes.powers: Fate magic, prophecy, energy drain spells

characters.name: Tabléyét
characters.appearance: Large shadowy figure, hooded cloak, ornate torch-sconce weapon, mask.
characters.personality: Honorable, justice-driven. Breaks contract to stop Marveno.
characters.speech_style: Gruff, accusatory: "You're a bad bitch, you know that Marveno?"

featured_moments.description: Intervenes, saves S'Awira, fights Marveno

characters.name: E'Norm
characters.appearance: Aged elf farmer, straw hat, coveralls, arthritic hands.
characters.personality: Kind, jovial, simple-minded. Proud adoptive father.

featured_moments.description: Adopts Anothor after he emerges from turnip

characters.name: Adam Void Jucas (also Jack Jucas)
characters.appearance: Tuxedo-clad (black formal suit, often dusty/bloodied), handsome, mid-30s, short neat hair. Drives Bentley Continental (British luxury car, frequently breaks down/fixed mysteriously). Carries Colt 0.45 pistol (coins or bullets) and nametag with phone number.
characters.personality: Initially courteous, flirtatious gentleman detective. Gains sentience → spirals into paranoia, guilt, violence (kills multiple Bouchie clones). Existential crisis, self-doubt, protective of Eve. Becomes ruthless killer when threatened, yet shows remorse. Intelligent, analytical (forensic skills), but overwhelmed by experiment truth.
characters.speech_style: Formal, polite ('mademoiselle', 'sir', 'my dear'). Sarcastic under stress ('A town without crime is like a business without funding'). Shocked exclamations: 'Goddamnations!', 'What in the 99 names of God!'. Combat: blunt threats.

relationships.romantic_interest: Evelyn Bouchie / Eve (marries in cabin, calls her 'my nectar')

crimes: Multiple Homicides: kills Sophia (Bouchie clone, first murder), Catalina/Catalie (Bouchie clone, shoots aorta/head), self-clone in 205 (assists), attempts on Radiyana/Michael
Assault/Attempted Murder: kicks waitress, threatens Radiyana

featured_moments.description: Pays with coins from pistol ('Keep the change'), flees after wallet loss
Flirts, exchanges numbers, discovers his own number on her tag
featured_moments.dialog: "An eye for an eye, or should I say… nametag."

featured_moments.description: Finds key labeled 'Michaelangelo B.', kills Sophia clone
Shoots Catalina over photo; fights Michael
Marries Eve, confronts Radiyana
Kills self-clone, shoots soldiers with coin-gun physics

other_attributes.super_skills: Forensic analysis, marksmanship (coin/lead pistol), driving (Bentley stunts)
other_attributes.clone_identity: Sentient clone of Jack Jucas; artificial 'detective on vacation' profile; gains full awareness of experiment

characters.name: Evelyn Bouchie (Eve / Aria)
characters.appearance: Blonde pixie bun or sideburns, innocent doe eyes, blue irises, pearl-white turtleneck + navy overalls or casual clothes. Identical to all Bouchie clones (Catalina/Sophia).
characters.personality: Timid, childlike innocence due to anterograde amnesia (forgets present quickly). Loyal/protective of Adam/Jack. Builds cabin, writes journal. Romantic, dream-like. Shocked by violence.
characters.speech_style: Shy, stuttering: "Um...", "Mhmm." Childlike joy or fear: "My dear Jack!"
likes: Adam/Jack Jucas ('my Jucas', marries in cabin)

featured_moments.description: Cares for unconscious Adam, writes journal, introduces as Eve
featured_moments.dialog: "I... I was worried that you were... sleeping for too long."

featured_moments.description: Hugs/kisses Adam as 'Jack', accepts proposal
Kicks Radiyana, screams at violence

other_attributes.condition: Anterograde amnesia (short-term memory loss), sentient clone aware of experiment
other_attributes.journal: Logs Vicilia anomalies, builds cabin from lumber

characters.name: Radiyana Doestoevsky
characters.appearance: Platinum-blonde long hair, siren eyes (deep red irises), mature/curvy figure, elegant clothing. Identical age to Adam.
characters.personality: Manipulative, seductive, knowledgeable insider. Sarcastic humor, protective of clones. Vengeful (chops Michael's hand). Motherly/teasing toward Adam.
characters.speech_style: Seductive, teasing: "Ara ara", "My honey-crispie". Russian phrases: "Bozhe moy". Authoritative explanations.

featured_moments.description: Reveals experiment truth, chops Michael's hand
featured_moments.dialog: "I was one of the Authorities myself."

featured_moments.description: Reveals as Authority defector, fights Adam

other_attributes.powers_knowledge: Full experiment awareness, Authority insider (erased memories)

characters.name: Michaelangelo Bouchie (Michael)
characters.appearance: Large burly man (7ft), short-trimmed black hair/beard, factory worker clothes. Loses left hand (bandaged stump).
characters.personality: Booming voice, protective of 'niece', initially aggressive toward Adam. Regretful after truth reveal.
crimes: Ordering clone assassination (Catalie to kill Adam)

featured_moments.description: Chases Adam after niece killing

MBC.description: NY-based agency sponsoring rebellion vs Russian invasion; air support (B-52, F-117, AF1), coordinates fortresses, sponsors Cooper/team. Plans like Mission Forkenstein.

MIW.description: Agency backing rebellion; agents Harrison, Amy, John. Symbiocyte tech links (FLAW, serum).

Russian Forces.description: Invading U.S. West Coast for Yucca nukes; Gora Chen/Zhigansk fortresses (AA towers, flak, Growler LAVs, SU-25, MIG-29, T-72, rocket artillery). Led by Dimitri.

City Dogs.description: Tactical street crew under Rogue Jacob; heavy slang, part MBC rebellion.

U.S. Marines.description: Official forces vs Russians; temp MBC allies (Ch27–30 assaults) but internal murders (Jerry/Reximus).
members: Puercto Rickon, Fredrick Max (NATO hires, reassigned)

Taskar_Brotherhood.description: Adventurer guild training explorers. Led by Culdrin Eastwok. Quests into Scahazahad caverns for Casoh sword.

Council_of_Wizards.description: Gondelin-based mages. Includes Nikneferon, Bamir, Rondellof. Monitor kingdom, make potions.

Undead_Dread_Fleet.description: Invading from east, settle Axe Island. Led by Arthagannon. Skeletons, dragons fleeing them.

Kingdom_of_Gondelin.description: Ruled by King Utheros. Knights like Daniel, wizards in council.

Akaminé.description: Warrior academy on Nasagna island (dragon fossil backyard). Trains magic, demon hunting. HQ with library, courtyard, botanical attic. Led by Chiroshi Hamadaw; druids like Doel.

Alkynes.description: Evil underground cult (illusion construction site entrance). Brainwashes recruits, uses gagûn shadow wolves, Jinnic demons. HQ reddish-black hellish underground. Led by Roguro Ganis.

Sirutov.description: Official military/police. Some corrupt under tyrant leader; rebels like Bain fight them.

Evil_God_Forces.description: Created in Urottharonngomonasht dimension. Includes Jinnic demons, gagûns.

Elven_Fantasy_Realm.description: Fantasy world with elves, magic, fate prophets. Includes farms, towns, dungeons, Marveno's chamber.

The_Writer's_Jumps.description: Multi-dimensional body-hopping phenomenon. Protagonist shifts between Earth, elf realms, dungeons.

The_Authority.description: Secret organization running Vicilia clone experiment. Erases memories, creates recurring cycles, eliminates sentient clones. Led by Lucifer Doestoevsky. Uses black armored vans, snipers, teleportation via Chasm.

Bouchie_Clones.description: Identical female clones (waitresses, co-founders of Café Eve-Jack). Short-term memory loss, romantic with Adam/Jack. Includes Eve (sentient, cabin), Catalina/Sophia (killed), Evelyn/Aria.

Vicilia_Residents.description: Cloned humans in simulated town. Infinite loop highway/Chasm. Gas factory, apartments, café.
